name: Benefits Eligibility Screening
summary: Screens applications for prioritization and review.
decision_effect: May delay, prioritize, or flag applications for further review.

name: Case Prioritization System
summary: Ranks and prioritizes cases for review based on certain criteria.
decision_effect: May determine how quickly a case is reviewed or whether it is flagged for further investigation.
fairness_concerns: lack of transparency in prioritization criteria

name: Fraud Detection System
summary: Identifies potentially suspicious applications or activities.
decision_effect: May flag cases for investigation or delay processing.
